No appearance. The tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF ENERGYSOLUTIONS FEDERAL EPC, INC. and ENERGYSOLUTIONS GOVERNMENTAL GROUP, INC.'s Petition To Enforce Subpoena is off calendar per moving party. Case settled. Judge Pro Tem: Ernst Halperin; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

No appearances on this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PlaintiffS ENERGYSOLUTIONS FEDERAL EPC, INC.'S and ENERGYSOLUTIONS GOVERNMENTAL GROUP, INC. fka ENERGYSOLUTIONS FEDERAL SERVICES, INC.'S Petition To Enforce Subpoena is continued to November 20, 2013 per ex parte order filed on Nov. 1, 2013.
